platform.name: Apple Developer
platform.category: Frameworks, mobile, games, hardware, and creative ecosystems

assumptions: The developer may create or use an Apple Account; paid Apple Developer Program membership is not required to learn and build with Xcode.
No Apple platform, Xcode template, framework, device target, or distribution goal has been selected yet.
Compatible Apple hardware is required for Xcode-based routes.

developer_goal: Create an Apple developer identity as needed and reach the earliest meaningful first Apple platform development success.

first_success.outcome: Unresolved: Apple does not publish one platform-wide first-success terminal.
first_success.observable_signal: Candidate signals include free Apple developer registration completion, or a selected Xcode/SwiftUI tutorial preview such as the Chat Prototype bubbles.

route_selection.surface: Apple Developer account registration and Xcode / Develop in Swift learning surfaces
route_selection.rule: Start at Apple Account / free developer registration when measuring account creation, then select one platform and template route only after the goal is fixed.

candidates.name: Free Apple developer registration only
candidates.reason: Official register flow is Sign in with Apple Account and accept the Apple Developer Agreement; it is account creation but not an app-running first success.

candidates.name: Xcode iOS App + Develop in Swift Chat Prototype
candidates.reason: A bounded beginner iOS SwiftUI route exists, but Apple presents multiple platforms and templates without choosing one canonical first mile.

candidates.name: Paid Apple Developer Program enrollment
candidates.reason: Required for App Store distribution and advanced capabilities, not for learning or on-device Personal Team testing.

required_path.action: Sign in with an Apple Account on developer.apple.com/register and accept the Apple Developer Agreement to register for free.

required_fields.label: Apple Account sign-in
required_fields.notes: Creating a new Apple Account, if needed, is an external identity flow whose full field set was not re-observed in this audit.

required_path.observable_result: The Apple Account is registered for free Apple developer access.

required_path.action: Choose the target Apple platform, Xcode template/interface, and intended first observable result.
required_path.observable_result: One concrete development route is selected.

required_path.action: Follow the selected official guide through Xcode/SDK install, project creation, implementation, and verification.
required_path.observable_result: The selected route's documented first-success signal appears.

prerequisites.description: An Apple Account meeting the regional minimum age requirement.
For Xcode routes: a compatible Mac and ability to install Xcode from the Mac App Store.

external_gates.description: Apple Account identity and agreement acceptance gate free developer registration.
Paid Program membership is required only if the chosen goal includes App Store or other Program-only capabilities.

unavoidable_waits.description: Xcode and platform SDK downloads when the selected route requires them.

platform_outcomes.description: Free registration unlocks developer downloads, forums, Feedback Assistant, and related free benefits.

excluded.reason: Official comparison states learning and building with Xcode does not require Program membership.
Occurs after any local first-success learning route.

sources.title: Creating an Xcode project for an app
Apple platforms overview
evidence_supported: Multiple platform entry points without one canonical first success

sources.title: Develop in Swift tutorials index data
evidence_supported: Beginner SwiftUI Chat Prototype candidate route

sources.title: Choosing a Membership
evidence_supported: Free Apple Account vs paid Program

uncertainties.question: Which Apple operating-system platform, Xcode template, technology, and terminal result define the first mile?
uncertainties.impact: Changes hardware, SDK downloads, project fields, code, signing, waits, and whether free registration alone is enough.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A bounded developer goal selecting one platform and tutorial/terminal, then a fresh-account walkthrough of that exact route.

uncertainties.question: If the developer lacks an Apple Account, which exact Apple Account creation fields are required before developer.apple.com/register?
uncertainties.impact: Adds an upstream identity-provider form whose required fields are not fully established in this audit.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Observed-public-ui evidence for current Apple Account creation fields used immediately before free developer registration.
